metadata.title: Agentic Knowledge Base and Workflow Platform Tasks
metadata.description: Implement the Docker Compose-based Daedalus knowledge base, search stack, sync workflow, and read-only MCP tooling

phases.name: Planning and Coordination
phases.description: Create the implementation plan and establish GitHub Project tracking

tasks.title: Create agentic platform plan and tasks JSON
tasks.description: Add the implementation plan and machine-readable task tracker under .agent/plans/agentic/

tasks.title: Create GitHub epic issue
tasks.description: Open a GitHub issue in DripDropz/daedalus that mirrors the implementation plan and acts as the top-level coordination artifact

tasks.title: Add epic issue to Project 5
tasks.description: Add the epic issue to GitHub Project 5 and confirm the issue is visible in the Daedalus Maintenance board

tasks.title: Define project field conventions
tasks.description: Document how status, priority, type, area, and phase will be represented for agentic platform work in GitHub Projects

phases.name: Compose Infrastructure
phases.description: Create the isolated Docker Compose stack and service skeleton

tasks.title: Add agentic docker compose file
tasks.description: Create docker-compose.agentic.yml with ParadeDB, Ollama, init, tools, and Search MCP services

tasks.title: Add agentic environment examples
tasks.description: Create env examples and volume/path conventions for the local knowledge stack

tasks.title: Build kb-tools service image
tasks.description: Create the tools container image and CLI entrypoint for ingest, sync, snapshot, and status commands

tasks.title: Build Search MCP stdio container entrypoint
tasks.description: Add a dedicated container entrypoint for the read-only Search MCP stdio process used by local clients and smoke checks

tasks.title: Add helper wrappers for compose tasks
tasks.description: Expose developer-friendly commands for booting the stack and running sync/snapshot operations

phases.name: Schema and Search Foundation
phases.description: Create the base database schema, indexes, and operational commands

tasks.title: Create schema and version tables
tasks.description: Define the core knowledge schema and schema-version tracking for future upgrades

tasks.title: Create core knowledge tables
tasks.description: Add documents, code chunks, GitHub entities, project items, and sync-state tables

tasks.title: Document disposable KB volume policy
tasks.description: Make the v1 schema-change and snapshot-restore policy explicit: import targets disposable databases and in-place schema upgrades are not required

tasks.title: Create BM25 and HNSW indexes
tasks.description: Add pg_search BM25 indexes and pgvector HNSW indexes for all searchable tables

tasks.title: Add search config registry and filters
tasks.description: Define search configuration for each entity type and the supported filter set

tasks.title: Add DB status and snapshot commands
tasks.description: Provide status, snapshot export, and snapshot restore commands for the knowledge database

tasks.title: Add schema bootstrap and index creation regression check
tasks.description: Prove that a fresh KB can initialize the schema, version tables, and search indexes exactly as the documented bootstrap contract requires

phases.name: Docs and Plan Ingestion
phases.description: Populate the knowledge base from Daedalus documentation and planning artifacts

tasks.title: Ingest agent and repo documentation
tasks.description: Index AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .agent docs, repo READMEs, and selected subsystem docs

tasks.title: Implement markdown chunking
tasks.description: Split markdown sources on heading boundaries and preserve section hierarchy for search and previews

tasks.title: Extract structured plan and workflow metadata
tasks.description: Capture stable workflow and canonical task-plan metadata during docs ingest, and expose explicit docs-only filters for canonical task-plan fields while keeping workflow descriptions as stored metadata/search context.

tasks.title: Add idempotency and content hashing
tasks.description: Skip unchanged docs on re-ingest by using content hashes and stored watermarks

phases.name: Code, GitHub, and Project Ingestion
phases.description: Index source code and GitHub coordination history

tasks.title: Implement TypeScript symbol chunking
tasks.description: Use a TypeScript-aware parser to extract symbols from the most agent-relevant code areas

tasks.title: Index entire Daedalus repository
tasks.description: Ingest the full repository immediately, with metadata and filters that still make the most agent-relevant areas fast to navigate

tasks.title: Ingest GitHub issues, PRs, and comments
tasks.description: Fetch repository issues, pull requests, and discussion threads for searchable history

tasks.title: Ingest Project 5 items and field values
tasks.description: Fetch GitHub Project 5 items and store project-specific status, priority, work type, area, phase, and KB impact metadata

tasks.title: Track sync cursors and watermarks
tasks.description: Persist repo commits, GitHub updatedAt values, and project cursors so all sources can refresh incrementally

phases.name: Search and CLI
phases.description: Implement embeddings, RRF search, and local developer commands

tasks.title: Implement Ollama embedding client
tasks.description: Create the embedding client used by ingestion, search, and MCP commands

tasks.title: Implement BM25, vector, and RRF search queries
tasks.description: Build the hybrid ranking layer that fuses BM25 and vector results into a single ranked list

tasks.title: Add search CLI and status commands
tasks.description: Expose search, status, and entity-inspection commands for local users and scripts

tasks.title: Add search quality fixtures
tasks.description: Create a regression set of known queries so ranking quality can be checked as the KB evolves

tasks.title: Add automated search ranking regression gate
tasks.description: Turn the checked-in search fixtures into an automated BM25, vector, and RRF regression suite so ranking quality remains a release-blocking contract rather than a manual check

phases.name: Snapshot Sharing
phases.description: Support export, import, and private team distribution of the knowledge base

tasks.title: Define snapshot manifest format
tasks.description: Specify the metadata format that accompanies exported database snapshots

tasks.title: Implement snapshot export and import commands
tasks.description: Create commands that export ParadeDB with a manifest and restore it on another developer machine

tasks.title: Enforce snapshot embedding-contract compatibility
tasks.description: Reject incompatible snapshot imports, surface the mismatch clearly in status output, and block post-import sync when the snapshot's embedding model or vector contract does not match the local KB contract

tasks.title: Enforce disposable import target safety
tasks.description: Make snapshot import fail fast when the target KB is not fresh, isolated, or otherwise explicitly disposable so restore cannot silently merge into an existing seeded database

tasks.title: Define canonical embedding contract and republish policy
tasks.description: Document the single supported v1 embedding contract for shared baselines, how operators discover it, when canonical snapshots must be republished from develop, and how mismatch handling surfaces in import, status, and sync flows

tasks.title: Clarify canonical snapshot manifest schema source of truth
tasks.description: Document that agentic/config/snapshot-manifest.schema.json is the canonical checked-in contract and any packaged runtime copy must be mechanically derived so the schema cannot drift silently.

tasks.title: Add snapshot compatibility guard tests
tasks.description: Prove that import, status, and post-import sync fail safely when a snapshot's embedding contract does not match the running KB contract

tasks.title: Add snapshot import target-safety tests
tasks.description: Prove that snapshot restore is refused for non-empty or otherwise non-disposable KB targets and only succeeds against the supported fresh-database restore path

tasks.title: Retired GitHub Actions snapshot publication workflow
tasks.description: Historical work item for the removed GitHub Actions publication path. It is no longer part of the supported rollout and exists only so the tracker can record that the path was superseded and removed.

tasks.title: Select private shared snapshot storage backend
tasks.description: Choose and document the durable private storage location for shared KB snapshots, including artifact discovery, authentication/bootstrap, naming, retention, integrity expectations after download, and outage recovery for the two developers

tasks.title: Document local baseline publish and download workflow
tasks.description: Document the real local GPU-backed publication, upload, download, and import workflow for two developers using the chosen private shared storage backend

tasks.title: Unwind GitHub Actions snapshot publication path
tasks.description: Remove the existing GitHub Actions snapshot publication workflow and all remaining docs or helper paths that present Actions artifacts as the canonical shared baseline

tasks.title: Implement import-then-sync-changed bootstrap flow
tasks.description: After import, refresh only local branch deltas and new GitHub/project updates so developers get current results quickly

phases.name: Freshness and Automation
phases.description: Keep the knowledge base current as the repo and project change over time through local refresh and publication workflows

tasks.title: Implement sync commands for all sources
tasks.description: Add sync docs, sync code, sync github, sync project, sync changed, and sync all commands

tasks.title: Add stale-index detection
tasks.description: Detect when docs/code are behind local HEAD or when GitHub/project data is behind its latest watermark

tasks.title: Add scheduled refresh and snapshot workflow
tasks.description: Cancelled after the publication strategy pivot away from GitHub-hosted Actions and toward explicit local GPU-backed baseline publication

tasks.title: Add manual full Project refresh path
tasks.description: Provide and document a full Project 5 refresh mode so eventual freshness converges even when edits land on already-seen items that cursor-only incremental sync may miss

tasks.title: Add Project full-refresh replay regression check
tasks.description: Verify that an edit to an already-seen Project 5 item becomes visible after the explicit full-refresh path so eventual freshness really re-converges

tasks.title: Add incremental update smoke checks
tasks.description: Verify that small repo and GitHub changes update only the affected entities instead of forcing a full rebuild, and cover the imported-baseline local refresh path used by the two developers

tasks.title: Handle repo and project removals during sync
tasks.description: Make sync converge on source truth by removing or invalidating stale KB records for deleted or renamed repo content and for removed Project items or cleared Project field values

tasks.title: Add ingest fixture coverage
tasks.description: Create automated docs, code, GitHub, and Project ingest fixtures so canonical metadata extraction, chunking, and idempotent re-ingest behavior stay regression-tested

tasks.title: Add removal reconciliation regression tests
tasks.description: Verify that deleted docs/code and removed or cleared Project metadata stop surfacing after the relevant sync or explicit full-refresh path runs against an already-seeded KB

tasks.title: Add Compose boot smoke regression check
tasks.description: Automate the repo-root stack contract by proving docker compose up, lightweight kb-tools readiness, and teardown continue to work as the platform evolves.

tasks.title: Document and validate ProjectV2 token failure handling
tasks.description: Spell out the required ProjectV2 token scopes and verify the operator-facing error path when GitHub repo reads work but organization Project 5 reads are denied.

tasks.title: Add snapshot round-trip regression tests
tasks.description: Verify that a seeded KB can be exported and restored on the supported disposable-target path without losing manifest integrity, row counts, or deterministic query behavior

tasks.title: Add local publish and fetch helper commands
tasks.description: Provide developer-friendly helper commands or scripts for building the canonical baseline locally, exporting the snapshot pair, and downloading/importing the latest shared baseline from the chosen private storage backend

tasks.title: Add local baseline publication smoke checks
tasks.description: Verify the end-to-end local publication path from develop: sync all, snapshot export, manifest validation, upload to shared storage, download, import, and deterministic post-import search proof

phases.name: MCP and Agent Documentation
phases.description: Expose the KB to agents and document how to use it

tasks.title: Implement read-only Search MCP server
tasks.description: Expose search, entity lookup, related results, and KB status tools over MCP

tasks.title: Write OpenCode and Claude Code setup docs
tasks.description: Document how to connect local agents to the Search MCP service, including example configs and environment variables

tasks.title: Update agentic knowledge base workflow doc
tasks.description: Review and update the Daedalus workflow document for booting, syncing, snapshotting, and troubleshooting the KB stack once the supporting commands and setup are implemented

tasks.title: Check core agent indexes
tasks.description: Verify and update AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and .agent/readme.md so they accurately point agents at the finalized KB workflow and MCP setup

tasks.title: Add MCP smoke tests against seeded KB
tasks.description: Exercise the stdio Search MCP against a seeded database so search, entity lookup, related-results, and status calls stay wired to the documented non-daemon client contract

phases.name: Validation and Rollout
phases.description: Validate the platform end to end and capture team onboarding learnings

tasks.title: Validate clean-machine bootstrap
tasks.description: Confirm the narrow clean-machine bootstrap contract: clone the repo, start the KB stack, import a compatible snapshot, run status --json, and prove a deterministic BM25 documents query succeeds

tasks.title: Review security and shared-storage boundaries
tasks.description: Verify tokens, private snapshot storage, DB snapshots, and MCP tools stay read-only where intended and remain limited to the two-developer workflow

tasks.title: Pilot with multiple developers
tasks.description: Run the real two-developer pilot, validate local publication to shared storage plus import and incremental sync on the second machine, and capture follow-up SOPs

tasks.title: Validate team-ready publication and handoff workflow
tasks.description: Confirm the broader two-developer rollout contract after bootstrap validation: canonical publish from develop, private storage handoff, import on a second machine, explicit mismatch handling, Project token guidance, and post-import incremental refresh behavior

tasks.title: Document canonical baseline ownership and fallback
tasks.description: Define who is allowed to publish the canonical baseline, when to republish from develop, and how the second developer recovers if the latest shared snapshot is stale, missing, or incompatible

tasks.title: Validate two-developer publish-download-import handoff
tasks.description: Prove that developer A can publish a baseline from develop on a GPU-equipped machine and developer B can fetch, import, validate, and continue with sync changed on another machine using only the documented workflow
